caption: The video shows a close-up view of a black leather steering wheel inside a vehicle. Embossed into the leather is the word "CORVETTE" in all capital letters. To the left of the steering wheel, a control stalk is partially visible with the word "WIPER" printed on it. As the sequence progresses, the camera pans slightly to the right, shifting the perspective of the embossed logo and revealing more of the steering wheel's surface. The lighting creates highlights and shadows across the textured leather, emphasizing the depth of the embossed lettering. No people are visible in the scene, and the focus remains entirely on the interior details of the car's cockpit.
